title: Remove public product deletion capability

requirements.text: Remove the delete button and delete functionality from the ProductCard component so public users cannot delete products from the catalog view

quotes: I don't want to public to be able to delete product, so don't leave the option for the public to delete any product

acceptanceCriteria: ProductCard component no longer displays a delete button
Public users cannot trigger product deletion from the catalog page
Admin users can still delete products through the SnackManagement admin page

requirements.text: Remove the delete button and delete functionality from the ProductDetail page so public users cannot delete products from the detail view

quotes: I don't want to public to be able to delete product, so don't leave the option for the public to delete any product

acceptanceCriteria: ProductDetail page does not display a delete button
Public users cannot trigger product deletion from the product detail page
Admin users retain delete capability through the SnackManagement admin page

constraints: Preserve admin delete functionality in the SnackManagement admin page
Do not modify backend deletion endpoints or logic
Maintain all other ProductCard and ProductDetail functionality (viewing, adding to cart, quantity selection)
nonGoals: Changing how admin users delete products
Adding new permission or role-based access control systems
